name: Heavenly Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Optional Garnishes: whipped cream and chocolate shavings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Crush the vanilla wafers finely and press them into a greased springform pan.
3. In a bowl, dissolve the gelatin in cold water; stir in melted butter until smooth.
4. Stir in ground toasted almonds, sugar, and chocolate chips until well combined.
5. Fold in sour cream, then whisk in whipped heavy cream and almond extract.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the crushed wafers.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool at room temperature before refrigerating.
9. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings if desired.
10. Turn off heat when serving.
